_comment: Canon EDSDK Camera Settings for Photobooth
_shutter_type_comment: For flash on EOS R8 use electronic_first_curtain. Do not use electronic/silent shutter with flash.
_av_comment: Aperture. f/5.6 is easier for focus and needs less flash power. Try f/8 later if groups are not fully in focus.
_tv_comment: Shutter speed. 1/160 is a safe flash sync start for EOS R8 + MS300V. Avoid 1/250+ with this non-HSS studio flash.
_color_temperature_comment: Only used when white_balance is color_temp. Range: 2500-10000K.
_evf_af_mode_comment: AF area mode during live view. face_tracking = detect and track faces/eyes.
_af_mode_comment: servo tracks people while live view is running. Lens switch must be AF.
_evf_view_type_comment: Live view exposure simulation. disable keeps preview bright for framing/focus with flash; final photo still uses fixed ISO/Tv/Av + MS300V.
_continuous_af_comment: Preview AF. Helps camera keep focusing during live view, but final capture behavior is controlled by focus_before_capture.
_eye_detection_af_comment: true = detect and focus on eyes. Canon R8 has excellent eye AF.
_focus_before_capture_comment: false = instant capture using continuous live-view AF focus. true = half-press AF before each shot for diagnostics; slower but safer.
_focus_delay_comment: Seconds to hold half-press AF before taking each photo.
_lock_camera_ui_comment: true = lock all buttons/dials on camera body. Prevents accidental changes.
_lock_mode_dial_comment: true = lock mode dial (M/Av/Tv/P). Prevents switching modes.
